7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* FemModule.cc (C) 2022-2025 */
9 /* */
10 /* FEM code to test vectorial FE for Elasticity problem. */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 
14 #include <arcane/core/IParallelMng.h>
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArcGeoSim.h"
17 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/CAWF/ICAWFMng.h"
18 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
19 
20 #include "FemModule.h"
21 #include "ElementMatrix.h"
22 #include "ElementMatrixHexQuad.h"
23 #include "BodyForce.h"
24 #include "Traction.h"
25 #include "Dirichlet.h"
26 
27 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 void FemModuleElasticity::init()
35 {
36 
37  Alien::setTraceMng(traceMng());
38  Alien::setVerbosityLevel(Alien::Verbosity::Debug);
39  m_parallel_mng = subDomain()->parallelMng();
40 
41 
42  m_dynamic_mesh_mng = nullptr;
43  if(options()->dynamicMeshMng.isPresent())
44  {
45  m_dynamic_mesh_mng = options()->dynamicMeshMng();
46  m_dynamic_mesh_mng->init();
47  }
48 
49  m_cawf_mng = nullptr ;
50  if(options()->cawfMng.isPresent())
51  m_cawf_mng = options()->cawfMng() ;
52  if(m_cawf_mng)
53  {
54  m_cawf_mng->init() ;
55  m_cawf_mng->setTimeIterStateOp(this) ;
56  m_cawf_mng->initMesh() ;
57  }
58  else
59  {
60  m_max_iter = options()->maxIter() ;
61  }
62 
63  /*
64  m_linear_solver = options()->linearSolver();
65  m_linear_solver->init() ;
66 
67  if (not m_linear_solver->hasParallelSupport() and m_parallel_mng->commSize() > 1)
68  {
69  fatal() << "Current solver has not a parallel support for solving linear system : skip it";
70  }*/
71 
72  m_geometry_mng = options()->geometryMng() ;
73  m_geometry_mng -> addItemGroupProperty(mesh() -> allCells(),
74  IGeometryProperty::PCenter,
75  IGeometryProperty::PVariable) ;
76 
77  m_geometry_mng -> addItemGroupProperty(mesh() -> allCells(),
78  IGeometryProperty::PMeasure,
79  IGeometryProperty::PVariable) ;
80 
81  m_geometry_mng -> addItemGroupProperty(mesh() -> allFaces(),
82  IGeometryProperty::PNormal,
83  IGeometryProperty::PVariable) ;
84 
85  m_geometry_mng -> addItemGroupProperty(mesh() -> allFaces(),
86  IGeometryProperty::PMeasure,
87  IGeometryProperty::PVariable) ;
88 
89  m_geometry_mng -> addItemGroupProperty(mesh() -> allFaces(),
90  IGeometryProperty::PCenter,
91  IGeometryProperty::PVariable) ;
92 
93  m_geometry_mng -> setPolicyTolerance(true) ;
94  m_geometry_mng -> update(&m_geometry_policy) ;
95 
96  m_event_index = 0 ;
97 
98  FaceGroup boundary = mesh()->allCells().outerFaceGroup();
99  FaceGroup top_face_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top());
100  if(top_face_boundary.empty())
101  {
102  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
103  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
104  UniqueArray<Integer> top_face_lids;
105  top_face_lids.reserve(boundary.size());
106  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,boundary)
107  {
108  info()<<"BOUNDARY FACE["<<iface->localId()<<"]"<<face_center[*iface].z;
109  if(face_center[*iface].z == 0.)
110  top_face_lids.add(iface->localId());
111  }
112  mesh()->faceFamily()->createGroup(options()->top(),top_face_lids,true) ;
113  top_face_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top());
114  }
115  {
116  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
117  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
118  Real top_z = 0. ;
119  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_face_boundary)
120  {
121  top_z += face_center[*iface].z ;
122  }
123  top_z = top_z/top_face_boundary.size() ;
124  m_top_z = top_z;
125  info()<<"TOP BOUNDARY AVG HEIGHT : "<<m_top_z;
126  }
127 
128  info()<<"TOP BOUNDARY SIZE["<<m_event_index<<"] : "<<top_face_boundary.size();
129  m_face_is_top.fill(0) ;
130  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_face_boundary)
131  {
132  m_face_is_top[iface] = 1 ;
133  }
134  {
135  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_normal =
136  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
137 
138  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & face_measure =
139  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
140  m_face_is_nz.fill(0) ;
141  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,boundary)
142  {
143  Real3 normal = face_normal[*iface]/face_measure[*iface] ;
144  Integer sgn = iface->isSubDomainBoundaryOutside() ? 1 : -1 ;
145  if(normal.z> 0.75)
146  m_face_is_nz[iface] = sgn ;
147  if(normal.z< -0.75)
148  m_face_is_nz[iface] = -sgn ;
149  }
150  }
151 
152 
153  m_new_layer_id = 0 ;
154  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells())
155  {
156  m_layer_id[*icell] = m_new_layer_id ;
157  }
158 
159  m_time = 0. ;
160  m_dt = 1. ;
161 
162  m_event_period = options()->eventPeriod() ;
163  m_next_event_time = m_time + m_event_period ;
164  if(m_cawf_mng)
165  {
166  m_cawf_mng->start() ;
167  m_dt = m_cawf_mng->initialTimeStep() ;
168  }
169  m_global_deltat = m_dt ;
170 
171  startInit();
172 }
173 
174 void FemModuleElasticity::
175 startInit()
176 {
177  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module startInit()";
178  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
179 
180  m_dof_per_node = defaultMesh()->dimension();
181  m_matrix_format = options()->matrixFormat();
182  m_assemble_linear_system = options()->assembleLinearSystem();
183  m_solve_linear_system = options()->solveLinearSystem();
184  m_cross_validation = options()->hasSolutionComparisonFile();
185  m_petsc_flags = options()->petscFlags();
186  m_hex_quad_mesh = options()->hexQuadMesh();
187 
188  _getMaterialParameters(mesh()->allCells());
189 
190  const UniqueArray<String> f_string = options()->f();
191  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Applying Bodyforce " << f_string;
192  for (Int32 i = 0; i < f_string.size(); ++i)
193  {
194  m_F[i] = 0.0;
195  if (f_string[i] != "NULL") {
196  m_applyBodyForce = true;
197  m_F[i] = std::stod(f_string[i].localstr());
198  }
199  }
200  if(m_applyBodyForce)
201  {
202  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & cell_center =
203  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allCells(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
204  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,mesh()->allCells())
205  {
206  m_cell_pressure[icell] = m_F[2]*cell_center[icell].z;
207  }
208  }
209 
210  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
211  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"initialize", elapsedTime);
212 }
213 
214 void FemModuleElasticity::
215 _updateTopBoundary(CellGroup const& new_event)
216 {
217  FaceGroup top_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top()) ;
218  if(top_boundary.empty())
219  {
220  info()<<"UPDATE TOP BOUNDARY FACE GROUP";
221  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & face_measure =
222  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
223 
224  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_normal =
225  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
226 
227  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
228  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
229 
230  UniqueArray<Integer> top_face_lids;
231  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
232  {
233  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,icell->faces())
234  {
235  if(iface->isSubDomainBoundary())
236  {
237  Real3 normal = face_normal[*iface]/face_measure[*iface] ;
238  if(std::abs(normal.z)> 0.75)
239  top_face_lids.add(iface->localId());
240  }
241  }
242  }
243  mesh()->faceFamily()->createGroup(options()->top(),top_face_lids,true) ;
244  }
245 
246  FaceGroup const& top_face_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top());
247  {
248  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
249  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
250  Real top_z = 0. ;
251  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_boundary)
252  {
253  top_z += face_center[*iface].z ;
254  info()<<"TOP FACE : "<<iface->uniqueId()<<" BOUNDARY CELL : "<<iface->boundaryCell().uniqueId()<<" H = "<<face_center[*iface].z ;
255  }
256  top_z /= top_boundary.size() ;
257  m_top_z = top_z;
258  info()<<"TOP BOUDARY AVG HEIGHT : "<<m_top_z;
259  }
260  info()<<"TOP BOUNDARY SIZE["<<m_event_index<<"] : "<<top_face_boundary.size() ;
261  m_face_is_top.fill(0) ;
262  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_face_boundary)
263  {
264  m_face_is_top[iface] = 1 ;
265  }
266 }
267 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
277 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
278 
279 void FemModuleElasticity::
280 computeDivU()
281 {
282  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module computeDivU()";
283  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
284 
285  // Stop code after computations
286  //if (m_global_iteration() > 0)
287  // subDomain()->timeLoopMng()->stopComputeLoop(true);
288 
289  m_dofs_on_nodes.initialize(defaultMesh(), m_dof_per_node);
290 
291  m_linear_system.reset();
292  m_linear_system.setLinearSystemFactory(options()->linearSystem());
293  m_linear_system.initialize(subDomain(), acceleratorMng()->defaultRunner(), m_dofs_on_nodes.dofFamily(), "Solver");
294  m_linear_system.clearValues();
295 
296  if (m_petsc_flags != NULL){
297  CommandLineArguments args = ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::getPetscFlagsFromCommandline(m_petsc_flags);
298  m_linear_system.setSolverCommandLineArguments(args);
299  }
300 
301  if (m_matrix_format == "BSR" || m_matrix_format == "AF-BSR")
302  _initBsr();
303  else if(m_matrix_format == "Alien-BSR" || m_matrix_format == "Alien-BSR-Acc")
304  _initAlienBsr() ;
305 
306  Int64 nb_node = mesh()->ownNodes().size();
307  Int64 total_nb_node = mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, nb_node);
308 
309  Int64 nb_face = mesh()->outerFaces().size();
310  Int64 total_nb_boundary_elt = mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, nb_face);
311 
312  Int64 nb_cell = mesh()->ownCells().size();
313  Int64 total_nb_elt = mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, nb_cell);
314 
315  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] mesh dimension " << defaultMesh()->dimension();
316  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] mesh boundary elements " << total_nb_boundary_elt;
317  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] mesh cells " << total_nb_elt;
318  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] mesh nodes " << total_nb_node;
319 
320  _computePrePro();
321  _doStationarySolve();
322  _computePostPro();
323 
324  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
325  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"compute", elapsedTime);
326 }
327 
328 
329 void
330 FemModuleElasticity::
331 test()
332 {
333 
334  info()<<"FEM Elasticity MODULE COMPUTATION";
335 
337  //
338  // RESOLUTION
339  //
340  if(m_cawf_mng)
341  {
342  if(m_cawf_mng->isCouplingOngoing())
343  {
344  info()<<"ITERATION ["<<m_iter<<"] TIME = "<<m_time<<" DT="<<m_dt ;
345 
346 
347  bool time_iter_is_valid = false ;
348  int sub_iter = 0 ;
349  while(not time_iter_is_valid)
350  {
351  info()<<"TIME STEP NUB ITERATION : "<<sub_iter;
352  // precice.readVectorData
353  m_cawf_mng->startTimeStep() ;
354 
355 #ifdef USE_PRECICE_V3
356  if(not m_cawf_mng->isMeshUpdate())
357  {
358  m_cawf_mng->updateMesh() ;
359  }
360 #endif
361  computeDivU();
362 
363  //precice.writeVectorData
364  m_cawf_mng->endTimeStep() ;
365 
366  // precice.advance coupling
367  Real precice_dt = m_cawf_mng->newTimeStep(m_dt) ;
368 
369  // precice.readIterationCheck point reloadOldState
370  // time step non converged
371  if( m_cawf_mng->validateCurrentTimeStep())
372  {
373  //m_dt = new_dt ;
374  m_dt = math::min(m_dt,precice_dt );
375  ++m_iter ;
376  m_time += m_dt ;
377  m_global_deltat = m_dt ;
378  time_iter_is_valid = true ;
379  info() << " VALIDATESTEP " ;
380  if(m_dynamic_mesh_mng)
381  {
382  if((m_event_period>0) && (m_time >= m_next_event_time))
383  {
384  m_dynamic_mesh_mng->updateNewEvent() ;
385  m_geometry_mng -> update(&m_geometry_policy) ;
386 
387  CellGroup new_event = mesh()->cellFamily()->findGroup("NewEventLayer") ;
388 
389  info()<<" NEW EVENT : "<<m_event_index<<" "<<new_event.size();
390  if(not new_event.empty())
391  {
392  info()<<" NEW EVENT LAYER : "<<m_new_layer_id;
393  ++ m_new_layer_id ;
394 
395 #ifdef USE_PRECICE_V3
396  m_cawf_mng->invalidateMesh(true) ;
397 #endif
398  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
399  {
400  m_cell_div_u[icell] = 0. ;
401  m_layer_id[icell] = m_new_layer_id ;
402  }
403 
404  _getMaterialParameters(new_event);
405 
406  if(m_applyBodyForce)
407  {
408  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & cell_center =
409  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allCells(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
410  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
411  {
412  m_cell_pressure[icell] = m_F[2]*cell_center[icell].z;
413  }
414  }
415 
416  _updateTopBoundary(new_event) ;
417 
418  }
419  ++ m_event_index ;
420  m_next_event_time += m_event_period ;
421  }
422  }
423  }
424  else
425  {
426  ++sub_iter;
427  m_global_deltat = 0. ;
428  info() << " ITERATE COUPLING " ;
429  info() << " Global Time " << m_global_time() << " Iter " << m_global_iteration();
430  }
431 
432  } //while( m_cawf_mng->isCouplingOngoing());
433  }
434  else
435  {
436  info()<<"FINAL TIME : "<<m_time ;
437  m_cawf_mng->finalize() ;
438  info()<<"STOP PERFECT";
439  subDomain()->timeLoopMng()->stopComputeLoop(true);
440  }
441  }
442  else
443  {
444  info()<<"ITERATION ["<<m_iter<<"] TIME = "<<m_time<<" DT="<<m_dt ;
445 
446  {
447  computeDivU() ;
448  ++m_iter ;
449  m_time += m_dt ;
450  m_global_deltat = m_dt ;
451  if(m_dynamic_mesh_mng)
452  {
453  if((m_event_period>0) && (m_time >= m_next_event_time))
454  {
455  m_dynamic_mesh_mng->updateNewEvent() ;
456  m_geometry_mng -> update(&m_geometry_policy) ;
457 
458  CellGroup new_event = mesh()->cellFamily()->findGroup("NewEventLayer") ;
459 
460  info()<<" NEW EVENT : "<<m_event_index<<" "<<new_event.size();
461  if(not new_event.empty())
462  {
463  info()<<" NEW EVENT LAYER : "<<m_new_layer_id;
464  ++ m_new_layer_id ;
465  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
466  {
467  m_layer_id[*icell] = m_new_layer_id ;
468  }
469 
470  _getMaterialParameters(new_event);
471 
472  if(m_applyBodyForce)
473  {
474  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & cell_center =
475  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allCells(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
476  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
477  {
478  m_cell_pressure[icell] = m_F[2]*cell_center[icell].z;
479  }
480  }
481 
482 
483  FaceGroup top_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top()) ;
484  if(top_boundary.empty())
485  {
486  info()<<"UPDATE TOP BOUNDARY FACE GROUP";
487  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & face_measure =
488  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
489 
490  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_normal =
491  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
492 
493  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
494  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
495 
496  UniqueArray<Integer> top_face_lids;
497  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,new_event)
498  {
499  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,icell->faces())
500  {
501  if(iface->isSubDomainBoundary())
502  {
503  Real3 normal = face_normal[*iface]/face_measure[*iface] ;
504  if(std::abs(normal.z)> 0.75)
505  top_face_lids.add(iface->localId());
506  }
507  }
508  }
509  mesh()->faceFamily()->createGroup(options()->top(),top_face_lids,true) ;
510  }
511 
512  FaceGroup const& top_face_boundary = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup(options()->top());
513  {
514  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & face_center =
515  m_geometry_mng->getReal3VariableProperty(mesh()->allFaces(),IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
516  Real top_z = 0. ;
517  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_boundary)
518  {
519  top_z += face_center[*iface].z ;
520  info()<<"TOP FACE : "<<iface->uniqueId()<<" BOUNDARY CELL : "<<iface->boundaryCell().uniqueId()<<" H = "<<face_center[*iface].z ;
521  }
522  top_z /= top_boundary.size() ;
523  m_top_z = top_z;
524  info()<<"TOP BOUDARY AVG HEIGHT : "<<m_top_z;
525  }
526  info()<<"TOP BOUNDARY SIZE["<<m_event_index<<"] : "<<top_face_boundary.size() ;
527  m_face_is_top.fill(0) ;
528  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,top_face_boundary)
529  {
530  m_face_is_top[iface] = 1 ;
531  }
532  }
533  ++ m_event_index ;
534  m_next_event_time += m_event_period ;
535  }
536  }
537  }
538  if(m_iter>=m_max_iter)
539  {
540  info()<<"FINAL TIME : "<<m_time ;
541  info()<<"STOP PERFECT";
542  subDomain()->timeLoopMng()->stopComputeLoop(true);
543  }
544  }
545 }
546 
547 void
548 FemModuleElasticity::saveOldState()
549 {
550  info() << " App1 saveOldState() " ;
551  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells())
552  {
553  //m_cell_pressure_N[icell] = m_cell_pressure[icell] ;
554  }
555 }
556 
557 void FemModuleElasticity::reloadOldState()
558 {
559  info() << " App1 ReloadOldState " ;
560  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells())
561  {
562  //m_cell_pressure[icell] = m_cell_pressure_N[icell] ;
563  }
564 }
565 
566 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
570 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
571 
572 void FemModuleElasticity::_initBsr()
573 {
574  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _initBsr()";
575  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
576 
577  bool use_csr_in_linearsystem =
578  options()->linearSystem.serviceName() == "HypreLinearSystem" ||
579  options()->linearSystem.serviceName() == "AlienLinearSystem" ||
580  options()->linearSystem.serviceName() == "PETScLinearSystem";
581 
582  if (m_matrix_format == "BSR")
583  m_bsr_format.initialize(defaultMesh(), m_dof_per_node, use_csr_in_linearsystem, 0);
584  else
585  m_bsr_format.initialize(defaultMesh(), m_dof_per_node, use_csr_in_linearsystem, 1);
586 
587  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
588  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"initialize-bsr-matrix", elapsedTime);
589 }
590 
591 void FemModuleElasticity::_initAlienBsr()
592 {
593  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _initAlienCsr()";
594  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
595  m_alien_bsr_format = m_linear_system.alienBsr(traceMng(),
596  *(acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue()),
597  m_dofs_on_nodes) ;
598  m_alien_bsr_format->initialize(defaultMesh(),m_dof_per_node) ;
599 
600  //m_alien_bsr_format.initialize(defaultMesh(), m_dof_per_node, use_csr_in_linearsystem, 0);
601 
602  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
603  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"initialize-alien-csr-matrix", elapsedTime);
604 }
605 
606 
607 void FemModuleElasticity::
608 _computePrePro()
609 {
610  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & cell_measure =
611  m_geometry_mng->getRealVariableProperty(mesh()->allCells(),IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
612 
613  // Compute BodyForce : Grad(Pressure)
614  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
615  {
616  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
617  {
618  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,allNodes())
619  {
620  Real pressure = 0. ;
621  Real volume = 0. ;
622  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,inode->cells())
623  {
624  Real cell_vol = cell_measure[icell]/icell->nbNode() ;
625  volume += cell_vol ;
626  pressure += cell_vol*m_cell_pressure[icell] ;
627  }
628  m_node_pressure[inode] = pressure/volume ;
629  }
630  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells())
631  {
632  m_cell_body_force[icell] = - ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientHexa8(*icell,m_node_coord,m_node_pressure) ;
633  }
634  }
635  }
636 }
637 
638 void FemModuleElasticity::
639 _computePostPro()
640 {
641  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
642  {
643  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
644  {
645  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,allNodes())
646  {
647  m_Ux[inode] = m_U[inode][0] ;
648  m_Uy[inode] = m_U[inode][1] ;
649  m_Uz[inode] = m_U[inode][2] ;
650  }
651 
652  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells())
653  {
654  Real3 gradUx = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientHexa8(*icell,m_node_coord,m_Ux) ;
655  Real3 gradUy = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientHexa8(*icell,m_node_coord,m_Uy) ;
656  Real3 gradUz = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientHexa8(*icell,m_node_coord,m_Uz) ;
657  m_cell_div_u[icell] = gradUx.x + gradUy.y + gradUz.z ;
658  }
659  }
660  }
661 }
662 
663 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
676 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
677 
678 void FemModuleElasticity::
679 _doStationarySolve()
680 {
681  if(m_assemble_linear_system)
682  {
683  if(m_alien_bsr_format)
684  {
685 #ifdef ALIEN_USE_SYCL
686  if(m_matrix_format == "Alien-BSR-Acc")
687  _defineMatrixProfileAcc() ;
688  else
689 #endif
690  {
691  auto func = [this](Alien::MatrixProfiler& profiler,ConstArrayView<Integer> allUIndex)
692  {
693  return this->_defineMatrixProfile(profiler,allUIndex) ;
694  } ;
695  m_alien_bsr_format->computeProfile<Alien::MatrixProfiler>(func);
696  }
697  }
698 
699  m_linear_system.startSystemAssembly() ;
700  _assembleBilinearOperator();
701  _assembleLinearOperator();
702  m_linear_system.endSystemAssembly() ;
703  }
704  if(m_solve_linear_system)
705  {
706  _solve();
707  _updateVariables();
708  }
709  if(m_cross_validation){
710  _validateResults();
711  }
712 }
713 
714 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
718 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
719 
720 void FemModuleElasticity::
721 _getMaterialParameters(CellGroup const& domain)
722 {
723  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _getMaterialParameters()";
724  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
725 
726  E = options()->E(); // Youngs modulus
727  nu = options()->nu(); // Poission ratio ν
728 
729  Real mu = (E / (2 * (1 + nu))); // lame parameter μ
730  Real lambda = E * nu / ((1 + nu) * (1 - 2 * nu)); // lame parameter λ
731 
732  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,domain)
733  {
734  m_cell_mu[icell] = mu ;
735  m_cell_lambda[icell] = lambda;
736  }
737 
738  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
739  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"get-material-params", elapsedTime);
740 }
741 
742 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
743 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
744 
745 
746 
747 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
757 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
758 
759 void FemModuleElasticity::
760 _assembleLinearOperator()
761 {
762  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _assembleLinearOperator()";
763  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
764 
765  VariableDoFReal& rhs_values(m_linear_system.rhsVariable()); // Temporary variable to keep values for the RHS
766  rhs_values.fill(0.0);
767 
768  auto node_dof(m_dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
769 
770  _applyBodyForce(rhs_values, node_dof);
771  _applyTraction(rhs_values, node_dof);
772  _applyDirichlet(rhs_values, node_dof);
773 
774  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
775  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"rhs-vector-assembly", elapsedTime);
776 }
777 
778 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
782 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
783 
784 void FemModuleElasticity::
785 _assembleBilinearOperator()
786 {
787  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _assembleBilinearOperator()";
788  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
789 
790  if (m_matrix_format == "BSR")
791  {
792  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView m_connectivity_view(mesh());
793  auto cn_cv = m_connectivity_view.cellNode();
794  auto command = makeCommand(acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue());
795  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, m_node_coord);
796  auto in_lambda_copy = Accelerator::viewIn(command, m_cell_lambda);
797  auto in_mu_copy = Accelerator::viewIn(command, m_cell_mu);
798 
799  m_bsr_format.computeSparsity();
800  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2)
801  m_bsr_format.assembleBilinearAtomic([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid) { return computeElementMatrixTria3Gpu(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord, in_lambda_copy, in_mu_copy); });
802  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
803  m_bsr_format.assembleBilinearAtomic([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid) { return computeElementMatrixTetra4Gpu(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord, in_lambda_copy, in_mu_copy); });
804  m_bsr_format.toLinearSystem(m_linear_system);
805  }
806  else if (m_matrix_format == "AF-BSR")
807  {
808  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView m_connectivity_view(mesh());
809  auto cn_cv = m_connectivity_view.cellNode();
810  auto command = makeCommand(acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue());
811  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, m_node_coord);
812  auto lambda_copy = Accelerator::viewIn(command,m_cell_lambda);
813  auto mu_copy = Accelerator::viewIn(command, m_cell_mu);
814 
815  m_bsr_format.computeSparsity();
816  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2)
817  m_bsr_format.assembleBilinearAtomicFree([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid, Int32 node_lid) { return computeElementVectorTria3Gpu(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord, lambda_copy, mu_copy, node_lid); });
818  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
819  m_bsr_format.assembleBilinearAtomicFree([=] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid, Int32 node_lid) { return computeElementVectorTetra4Gpu(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord, lambda_copy, mu_copy, node_lid); });
820  m_bsr_format.toLinearSystem(m_linear_system);
821  }
822  else if (m_matrix_format == "Alien-BSR")
823  {
824  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView m_connectivity_view(mesh());
825  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2)
826  {
827  if (m_hex_quad_mesh) {
828  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<8>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixQuad4(cell); });
829  }
830  else {
831  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<6>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixTria3(cell); });
832  }
833  }
834  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
835  {
836  if (m_hex_quad_mesh) {
837  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<24>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixHexa8(cell); });
838  }
839  else {
840  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<12>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixTetra4(cell); });
841  }
842  }
843  }
844 #ifdef ALIEN_USE_SYCL
845  else if (m_matrix_format == "Alien-BSR-Acc")
846  {
847  _assembleBilinearOperatorAlienAcc() ;
848  }
849 #endif
850  else if (m_matrix_format == "DOK")
851  {
852  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2) {
853  if (m_hex_quad_mesh) {
854  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<8>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixQuad4(cell); });
855  }
856  else {
857  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<6>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixTria3(cell); });
858  }
859  }
860  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3) {
861  if (m_hex_quad_mesh) {
862  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<24>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixHexa8(cell); });
863  }
864  else {
865  _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu<12>([this](const Cell& cell) { return _computeElementMatrixTetra4(cell); });
866  }
867  }
868  }
869  else {
870  ARCANE_FATAL("Unsupported matrix type, only DOK| BSR|AF-BSR is supported.");
871  }
872 
873  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
874  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"lhs-matrix-assembly", elapsedTime);
875 }
876 
877 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
888 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
889 
890 template <int N>
891 void FemModuleElasticity::
892 _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu(const std::function<RealMatrix<N, N>(const Cell&)>& compute_element_matrix)
893 {
894  const Int32 dim = mesh()->dimension();
895  auto node_dof(m_dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
896 
897  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, allCells())
898  {
899  Cell cell = *icell;
900  auto K_e = compute_element_matrix(cell);
901 
902  Int32 n1_index = 0;
903  for (Node node1 : cell.nodes())
904  {
905  if (node1.isOwn())
906  {
907  Int32 n2_index = 0;
908  for (Node node2 : cell.nodes()) {
909  for (Int32 i = 0; i < dim; ++i) {
910  DoFLocalId dof1 = node_dof.dofId(node1, i);
911  for (Int32 j = 0; j < dim; ++j) {
912  DoFLocalId dof2 = node_dof.dofId(node2, j);
913  Real value = K_e(dim * n1_index + i, dim * n2_index + j);
914  m_linear_system.matrixAddValue(dof1, dof2, value);
915  }
916  }
917  ++n2_index;
918  }
919  }
920  ++n1_index;
921  }
922  }
923 }
924 
925 
926 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
930 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
931 
932 void FemModuleElasticity::
933 _solve()
934 {
935  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _solve()";
936  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
937 
938  m_linear_system.applyLinearSystemTransformationAndSolve();
939 
940  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
941  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"solve-linear-system", elapsedTime);
942 }
943 
944 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
945 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
946 
947 void FemModuleElasticity::
948 _validateResults()
949 {
950  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _validateResults()";
951  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
952 
953  if (allNodes().size() < 200) {
954  int p = std::cout.precision();
955  std::cout.precision(17);
956  ENUMERATE_ (Node, inode, allNodes()) {
957  Node node = *inode;
958  std::cout << "( N_id, u1, u2, u3 ) = ( "
959  << node.uniqueId() << ", " << m_U[node].x << ", " << m_U[node].y << ", " << m_U[node].z
960  << ")\n";
961  }
962  std::cout.precision(p);
963  }
964 
965  String filename = options()->solutionComparisonFile();
966  const double epsilon = options()->resultEpsilon();
967  const double min_value_to_test = 1.0e-10;
968 
969  Arcane::FemUtils::checkNodeResultFile(traceMng(), filename, m_U, epsilon, min_value_to_test);
970 
971  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
972  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"result-validation", elapsedTime);
973 }
974 
975 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
984 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
985 
986 void FemModuleElasticity::
987 _updateVariables()
988 {
989  info() << "[ArcaneFem-Info] Started module _updateVariables()";
990  Real elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime();
991 
992  {
993  VariableDoFReal& dof_u(m_linear_system.solutionVariable());
994  auto node_dof(m_dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
995  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
996  ENUMERATE_ (Node, inode, ownNodes()) {
997  Node node = *inode;
998  Real u1_val = dof_u[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)];
999  Real u2_val = dof_u[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)];
1000  Real u3_val = dof_u[node_dof.dofId(node, 2)];
1001  m_U[node] = Real3(u1_val, u2_val, u3_val);
1002  }
1003  else
1004  ENUMERATE_ (Node, inode, ownNodes()) {
1005  Node node = *inode;
1006  Real u1_val = dof_u[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)];
1007  Real u2_val = dof_u[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)];
1008  m_U[node] = Real3(u1_val, u2_val, 0.);
1009  }
1010  }
1011 
1012  m_U.synchronize();
1013 
1014  elapsedTime = platform::getRealTime() - elapsedTime;
1015  ArcaneFemFunctions::GeneralFunctions::printArcaneFemTime(traceMng(),"update-variables", elapsedTime);
1016 }
1017 
1018 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1019 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1020 
1021 ARCANE_REGISTER_MODULE_FEM(FemModuleElasticity);
1022

ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientHexa8

Computes the gradient of a scalar field 'u' for a Hexa8 element.
